name: IdsCchgSnglCatGrpRowCntBal

text.value: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.TMP_IdsCchgSnglCatGrpRowCntBal_IN; WITH cte_in AS ( SELECT SRC.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_CD AS SRC_CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_CD, SRC.SRC_SYS_CD_SK AS SRC_SRC_SYS_CD_SK, TRGT.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_CD AS TRGT_CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_CD, TRGT.SRC_SYS_CD_SK AS TRGT_SRC_SYS_CD_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.B_CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP AS SRC FULL OUTER JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP AS TRGT ON TRGT.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_CD = SRC.CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_CD AND TRGT.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = SRC.SRC_SYS_CD_SK WHERE TRGT.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK = @{pipeline().parameters.ExtrRunCycle} ) SELECT * INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.TMP_IdsCchgSnglCatGrpRowCntBal_IN FROM cte_in;

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.TMP_IdsCchgSnglCatGrpRowCntBal_Research; WITH cte_research AS ( SELECT SRC_CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_CD, SRC_SRC_SYS_CD_SK, TRGT_CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_CD, TRGT_SRC_SYS_CD_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.TMP_IdsCchgSnglCatGrpRowCntBal_IN WHERE SRC_CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_CD IS NULL OR SRC_SRC_SYS_CD_SK IS NULL OR TRGT_CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP_CD IS NULL OR TRGT_SRC_SYS_CD_SK IS NULL ) SELECT * INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.TMP_IdsCchgSnglCatGrpRowCntBal_Research FROM cte_research;

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.TMP_IdsCchgSnglCatGrpRowCntBal_Notify; IF (@{pipeline().parameters.ToleranceCd} = 'OUT') BEGIN SELECT 'ROW COUNT BALANCING FACETS - IDS CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP IS OUT OF TOLERANCE' AS NOTIFICATION INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.TMP_IdsCchgSnglCatGrpRowCntBal_Notify; END ELSE BEGIN SELECT CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR(1)) AS NOTIFICATION INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.TMP_IdsCchgSnglCatGrpRowCntBal_Notify WHERE 1=0; END;

Description:
PROCESSING:  This job runs Balancing Full Outer Join SQL on CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP and B_CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP tables to find out if there are any fallouts.
